titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 679

p.seg: To all Christ’s faithful who see or hear these letters, Ralph the Prior, and the convent of the church of Durham, send greeting in the Lord.

Know that we have granted and by this our present charter have made firm to our beloved friend, the lord W(illiam) of Bondington, Chancellor of the Scots, the marriage of the heir of Geoffrey Ridel, and the guardianship of the land of the same heir in the toun of Flemington, until the said heir shall have reached the legal age.
And in testimony of this matter we have applied the seal of our chapter to this written deed.
